title.en: Ye Tian mentioned it to Yang Yuan.

content.en:
In the years that followed, Ye Tian worked hard to comprehend the ultimate Chonggong rules.

One Chonggong year after another passed, and before he knew it, five thousand Chonggong years had passed.

That day.

With the help of the Mist Monument, Ye Tian finally comprehended a ray of the ultimate Chonggong rules, and he continued to comprehend the ultimate Chonggong rules, and only came out after tens of thousands of Chonggong years.

"Can you tell the Mist Pavilion that I have comprehended the ultimate Chonggong rules!"

Ye Tian mentioned it to Yang Yuan.

Suddenly, Yang Yuan was shocked.

"What, you comprehended the ultimate Chonggong rules?" Yang Yuan was shocked.

After that, Ye Tian began to retreat to impact the ultimate palace master realm, and he comprehended the ultimate Chonggong rules, so it was easy for him to break through.

Boom! ! ! !

Ye Tian broke the shackles, countless energies poured into his body, the ultimate palace in his body was also transforming, infinite light burst out from him, projecting many time and space.

Immediately afterwards, 02 all kinds of time and space power blessed himself, and the great power returned to himself.

"Break!"

Ye Tian broke the shackles, and his cultivation officially entered the ultimate palace realm. In terms of realm, he was equivalent to an ancient demon-level powerhouse and an ultimate supreme powerhouse in his own time and space.

"Ye Tian, ​​congratulations on breaking through to the ultimate palace master realm. Let's go, I'll take you to see the master of our Wu Pavilion!"

Yang Yuan said.

Wu Pavilion's Wu Pavilion is one of the three eternal ultimate palace masters of Wu Pavilion, and also the most powerful one.

Soon.

Ye Tian met this Wu Pavilion master-Wu Xuan.

"Hello, Pavilion Master!"

After seeing Pavilion Master Wu Xuan, Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian, ​​congratulations on becoming the Ultimate Palace Master!" Wu Xuan congratulated.

Immediately, Ye Tian and Wu Xuan started to communicate, and during the communication, he could roughly judge Wu Xuan's strength by sensing his breath. He should not be strong among the eternal Ultimate Palace Masters, and he was far inferior to his real body in another time and space. His real body could kill him in a breath.

Then.

Ye Tian asked about the strange gray fog area.

"Pavilion Master, do you know the situation of other realms outside the strange gray fog area?"

Ye Tian asked.

Wu Xuan shook his head, "I don't know either. The three of us, the eternal Ultimate Palace Masters, dare not go too deep into the strange gray fog area, so we don't know much about other realms now, but we have a guess about the strange gray fog area."

"What guess?" Ye Tian was curious.

“The power of the strange grey fog area seems to come from outside our time and space. In fact, in the more distant past, there was no strange grey fog area in our time and space. It appeared later. Then the strange grey fog area isolated a piece of area and formed thirty-six realms. In the long time, the power of the grey fog was not terrible. The eternal ultimate palace masters of the thirty-six realms could still contact each other, but now they can’t contact each other, or if they want to contact each other, they have to payA huge price. "

"However, a long time ago, a top eternal ultimate palace master came to our fog area, but left very quickly. Therefore, if you want to travel through the gray fog area, you need the top eternal ultimate palace master's strength, but we can't do it."

"Of course, although the gray fog area is dangerous, there are many opportunities. I was able to break through to the eternal ultimate palace master realm because I got an opportunity in the gray fog area. But you have just broken through to the ultimate palace master. Don't get close to the gray fog area, otherwise you will be transformed into a fog beast after a long time!"

Wu Xuan reminded.

"Thank you for the reminder, Pavilion Master. I know the severity and will not rashly enter the gray fog area! ”

Then, he left Wuxuan, and Wuge soon made Ye Tian’s identity public, letting other people in Wuge know that a new Ultimate Palace Master had been born in Wuge.

After breaking through and becoming the Ultimate Palace Master, many of Wuge’s Ultimate Palace Secrets were open to him, and he could learn from these Ultimate Palace Secrets and techniques.

Then.

His real body used the duplicate body to deduce and analyze, thereby creating the top Ultimate Palace Secrets, thereby improving the combat power of this body.

After a period of time , Ye Tian sacrificed a copy of his body, and finally deduced the Extreme Blood Armor, Extreme Blood Blade, and Extreme Blood Escape to the level of the top Ultimate Chonggong Secret Method, and the power increased by at least ten times.

So far, his strength has also skyrocketed!

In the years that followed, he used various resources to improve his cultivation, and often entered the Mist Monument to comprehend the Ultimate Chonggong rules, but still did not show the ultimate will of the extreme.

In addition, as his strength became stronger and stronger, the connection between his body and the real body in another time and space line was strengthened, The interval between information transmission is not long.

Perhaps when his body breaks through to the eternal ultimate palace realm, there will be no delay between the two time and space lines, and memory and perception can be synchronized in real time.

This day.

Ye Tian showed his ultimate will, shocking the entire Mist Pavilion, and Yang Yuan was dumbfounded. He made up a random reason, that is, he occasionally entered the gray fog area and got an opportunity, so he broke through. Although the other ultimate palace masters did not believe it, they would not question Ye Tian.

In addition.

His real body has been analyzing the Ultimate Palace Rules, which has also made his progress rapidly.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's understanding of the Ultimate Palace Rules has reached an extremely high level.

"The Ultimate Palace Rules have reached the 136th level!"

Ye Tian smiled.

If he continues to analyze with the help of his real body, it should not be difficult for him to break through the Ultimate Palace Rules to the 365th level of perfection. At that time, if he can comprehend the eternity of this time and space line,=|

In the days that followed, he occasionally entered the gray fog area to collect some resources.

Gray fog area.

Ye Tian had just come in not long ago, and the terrifying gray fog aura wanted to invade his body and affect his will, but his will had reached the ultimate will of the extreme, and the gray fog aura could not affect him at all.

So, he easily went deep into the gray fog area.

Soon, he encountered fog beasts, but ordinary fog beasts were not strong, not as strong as the ultimate palace master, and he could kill them easily, but occasionally he would encounter fog beasts comparable to the ultimate palace master, but his strength was so terrifying that he easily killed fog beasts comparable to the general ultimate palace master.

Gradually, he obtained a lot of resources, including treasure resources that could assist in comprehending the ultimate heavy palace rules. .
